name: Mustard Crusted Pork Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a food processor, combine scallions, garlic, thyme, salt and pepper; process until finely chopped. Add mustard and olive oil; process until mixture forms a paste.
3. Place pork on a rack in roasting pan; spread with scallion mixture. Pour broth into bottom of pan. Roast, basting occasionally, 45-50 minutes, or until meat thermometer registers 160°F. Let stand 10 minutes before carving into 1/4-inch thick slices.
